titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Muhammad Ibn Al-Walid Al-Kirmani
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Muhammad Ibn Al-Walid Al-Kirmani

segments: ه عن محمّد بن الوليد الكرمانيّ فقد رويته عن أحمد بن زياد بن جعفر الهمدانيّ- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عليّ بن إبراهيم بن هاشم، عن محمّد بن الوليد الكرمانيّ‌.
arabic.text: ه عن محمّد بن الوليد الكرمانيّ فقد رويته عن أحمد بن زياد بن جعفر الهمدانيّ- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عليّ بن إبراهيم بن هاشم، عن محمّد بن الوليد الكرمانيّ‌.

segments: And whatever is narrated from Muhammad ibn Al-Walid Al-Kirmani, I have narrated it from Ahmad ibn Ziyad ibn Jafar Al-Hamadani - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Ali ibn Ibrahim ibn Hashim, from Muhammad ibn Al-Walid Al-Kirmani.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: And whatever is narrated from Muhammad ibn Al-Walid Al-Kirmani, I have narrated it from Ahmad ibn Ziyad ibn Jafar Al-Hamadani - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Ali ibn Ibrahim ibn Hashim, from Muhammad ibn Al-Walid Al-Kirmani.
